title: Supervise agricultural crop harvesting
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise agricultural crop harvesting demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for harvesting

pcs.text: Assess crop maturity and quality standards required in preparation for harvesting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess crop maturity and quality standards required in preparation for harvesting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess crop maturity and quality standards required in preparation for harvesting.

pcs.text: Assess the role of technology in improving efficiencies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the role of technology in improving efficiencies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the role of technology in improving efficiencies.

pcs.text: Determine and implement pre-harvest treatments according to crop production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and implement pre-harvest treatments according to crop production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and implement pre-harvest treatments according to crop production plan.

pcs.text: Identify and comply with licence or permit requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and comply with licence or permit requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and comply with licence or permit requirements.

pcs.text: Check insurance requirements are in place and implement risk management strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check insurance requirements are in place and implement risk management strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check insurance requirements are in place and implement risk management strategies.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and develop and implement controls procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and develop and implement controls procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and develop and implement controls procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for harvesting

elements.title: Prepare a harvesting plan

pcs.text: Assess optimum timing for harvest according to crop maturity assessment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess optimum timing for harvest according to crop maturity assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess optimum timing for harvest according to crop maturity assessment.

pcs.text: Assess resource requirements for size of crop and estimated timing of harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess resource requirements for size of crop and estimated timing of harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess resource requirements for size of crop and estimated timing of harvest.

pcs.text: Identify storage resources and strategies for handling harvested crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify storage resources and strategies for handling harvested crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify storage resources and strategies for handling harvested crop.

pcs.text: Identify potential disruptions to harvest operations and prepare contingency procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential disruptions to harvest operations and prepare contingency procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential disruptions to harvest operations and prepare contingency procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and arrange fire prevention and control procedures according to risk assessment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and arrange fire prevention and control procedures according to risk assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and arrange fire prevention and control procedures according to risk assessment.

pcs.text: Develop work team communications procedures for harvesting operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop work team communications procedures for harvesting operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop work team communications procedures for harvesting operations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare a harvesting plan

elements.title: Implement harvest plan

pcs.text: Arrange and confirm labour and equipment resources for harvesting operations within budgetary constraints
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange and confirm labour and equipment resources for harvesting operations within budgetary constraints?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange and confirm labour and equipment resources for harvesting operations within budgetary constraints.

pcs.text: Communicate harvesting plan and communication procedures to work team and contractors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate harvesting plan and communication procedures to work team and contractors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate harvesting plan and communication procedures to work team and contractors.

pcs.text: Implement harvesting operations and contingencies procedures according to impact of weather, equipment or technology and work team performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement harvesting operations and contingencies procedures according to impact of weather, equipment or technology and work team performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement harvesting operations and contingencies procedures according to impact of weather, equipment or technology and work team performance.

pcs.text: Coordinate and monitor equipment performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Coordinate and monitor equipment performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Coordinate and monitor equipment performance.

pcs.text: Control contamination and biosecurity threats according to workplace procedures and quality standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Control contamination and biosecurity threats according to workplace procedures and quality standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Control contamination and biosecurity threats according to workplace procedures and quality standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement harvest plan

elements.title: Complete harvest operation

pcs.text: Assess crop quality and segregate according to marketing grades
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess crop quality and segregate according to marketing grades?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess crop quality and segregate according to marketing grades.

pcs.text: Monitor moisture content according to industry classification standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor moisture content according to industry classification standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor moisture content according to industry classification standards.

pcs.text: Assess and reconcile harvesting operations and outcomes against harvest strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and reconcile harvesting operations and outcomes against harvest strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and reconcile harvesting operations and outcomes against harvest strategy.

pcs.text: Record information on harvesting operations according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record information on harvesting operations according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record information on harvesting operations according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete harvest operation

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
